testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: (//a[contains(@href,'/stay/')])[1] (tried for 40 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.5', java.version: '21.0.4' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.179, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: /var/folders/bx/5btdglgx3kz...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55436}, goog:processID: 38273, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55436/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.179, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 9ccebf3066737f94f93905228b96a4a4

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: (//a[contains(@href,'/stay/')])[1] (tried for 40 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.5', java.version: '21.0.4' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.179, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: /var/folders/bx/5btdglgx3kz...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55436}, goog:processID: 38273, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55436/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.179, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 9ccebf3066737f94f93905228b96a4a4 at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at stepdefinitions.BookingSteps.user_clicks_book_now(BookingSteps.java:95) at ✽.user clicks book now(file:///Users/suryaprakashj/Downloads/PHP@/src/test/resources/features/Booking.feature:22)
